name: concierge
displayName: CONCIERGE — Repo welcome & the idea-to-production status line
description: The ARRIVAL layer of the idea-to-production marketplace — it greets whoever opens a repo and offers the suite's status line. When a project ships a maintainer-authored .claude/welcome.md, a SessionStart hook injects it so the agent opens with a one-line greeting and a conversational decision tree of the handful of things people come there to do — operate the software, or evolve it — and routes the user to the right command, runbook, or downstream plugin. Smart-gated: it greets only on a vague/cold open and steps aside the moment the user states a concrete task, so it never nags. /concierge:define-welcome authors that welcome by reading the repo. CONCIERGE also ships the idea-to-production STATUS LINE: /concierge:statusline turns on a rich two-line ANSI bar (context & rate-limit gauges, the product-lifecycle phase, and a ⚔ reviewer-catch tally), and on first activation it makes a single unobtrusive offer to enable it. The engine ships in the marketplace; welcome content stays repo-local, exactly like CLAUDE.md. Stands alone; lights up ideator and foundry as the 'evolve the software' destinations when they are installed.

metadata.note: skills/, commands/, and hooks/hooks.json are auto-discovered from the plugin root. /concierge:define-welcome authors a repo's .claude/welcome.md; the SessionStart hook (hooks/inject-welcome.sh) renders it when present (silent no-op when absent). The status line ships in statusline/: /concierge:statusline runs statusline/install.sh (copies i2p-statusline.sh → ~/.claude, points settings.json at it); a PostToolUse hook (statusline/count-adversarial-catches.sh) feeds the ⚔ caught tally; a SessionStart hook (hooks/offer-statusline.sh) makes a one-time offer. Carries the byte-identical SOUL.md + inject-soul.sh canonical copies (CI verify-prereqs.sh checks E/F).
